headline: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PEG) a High Growth Utility Stock  on Earnings Growth
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is one of the high growth utility stocks to buy according to analysts. On April 21, the board of directors at Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) reiterated its commitment to shareholder value by approving a quarterly dividend of $0.67 per share. The dividend is to be paid on […]
